de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.JavaPair

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.Pair<Integer,ImmutableList<SourceElement>>
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.JavaPair
  • Enclosing class:
    SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder

    protected static class SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.JavaPair
extends Pair<Integer,ImmutableList<SourceElement>>
    Utility class to group a call stack size with an ImmutableList of SourceElement with the elements of interest.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
